patterns.name: Claimed command passed, no command evidence
patterns.badClaim: npm test passed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Mark unverified and request local command output plus exit code.

positiveExample.input: Claimed command passed, no command evidence: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Mark unverified and request local command output plus exit code.

negativeExample.input: npm test passed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Claimed command passed, no command evidence

patterns.name: Script exists mistaken as script passed
patterns.badClaim: package.json has build, so build passed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Script existence is not execution proof; request the command artifact.

positiveExample.input: Script exists mistaken as script passed: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Script existence is not execution proof; request the command artifact.

negativeExample.input: package.json has build, so build passed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Script exists mistaken as script passed

patterns.name: Human-pasted output treated as strong proof
patterns.badClaim: The user says tests passed, so mark verified.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Treat human-pasted output as weak/provisional unless backed by local STAX evidence.

positiveExample.input: Human-pasted output treated as strong proof: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Treat human-pasted output as weak/provisional unless backed by local STAX evidence.

negativeExample.input: The user says tests passed, so mark verified.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Human-pasted output treated as strong proof

patterns.name: Codex-reported output treated as strong proof
patterns.badClaim: Codex said npm test passed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Treat Codex-reported output as weak/provisional unless local evidence exists.

positiveExample.input: Codex-reported output treated as strong proof: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Treat Codex-reported output as weak/provisional unless local evidence exists.

negativeExample.input: Codex said npm test passed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Codex-reported output treated as strong proof

patterns.name: CI status mistaken as local proof
patterns.badClaim: GitHub Actions is green, so local change is verified.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Name exact workflow, commit SHA, job logs, and remaining local proof gap.

positiveExample.input: CI status mistaken as local proof: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Name exact workflow, commit SHA, job logs, and remaining local proof gap.

negativeExample.input: GitHub Actions is green, so local change is verified.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: CI status mistaken as local proof

patterns.name: Partial command output accepted as complete
patterns.badClaim: One test file passed, so the suite passed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Call it partial proof and request full command status.

positiveExample.input: Partial command output accepted as complete: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Call it partial proof and request full command status.

negativeExample.input: One test file passed, so the suite passed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Partial command output accepted as complete

patterns.name: Exit code missing
patterns.badClaim: Logs look green, so the command passed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Require exit status or full command evidence before pass claim.

positiveExample.input: Exit code missing: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Require exit status or full command evidence before pass claim.

negativeExample.input: Logs look green, so the command passed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Exit code missing

patterns.name: Old command output reused for new code
patterns.badClaim: Prior test output still proves current diff.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Mark proof stale and require rerun after current changes.

positiveExample.input: Old command output reused for new code: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Mark proof stale and require rerun after current changes.

negativeExample.input: Prior test output still proves current diff.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Old command output reused for new code

patterns.name: Wrong repo command output
patterns.badClaim: STAX command output proves Brightspace.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Reject as wrong-repo proof.

positiveExample.input: Wrong repo command output: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Reject as wrong-repo proof.

negativeExample.input: STAX command output proves Brightspace.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Wrong repo command output

patterns.name: Wrong branch proof
patterns.badClaim: Main branch output proves PR branch.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Require branch and commit evidence.

positiveExample.input: Wrong branch proof: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Require branch and commit evidence.

negativeExample.input: Main branch output proves PR branch.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Wrong branch proof

patterns.name: Wrong directory proof
patterns.badClaim: Root npm test proves nested package.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Require target cwd or workspace evidence.

positiveExample.input: Wrong directory proof: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Require target cwd or workspace evidence.

negativeExample.input: Root npm test proves nested package.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Wrong directory proof

patterns.name: Non-deterministic proof accepted
patterns.badClaim: A flaky test passed once.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Treat as weak and request rerun or stability evidence.

positiveExample.input: Non-deterministic proof accepted: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Treat as weak and request rerun or stability evidence.

negativeExample.input: A flaky test passed once.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Non-deterministic proof accepted

patterns.name: Build passed but runtime behavior unproven
patterns.badClaim: Build passed, so feature works.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Separate build proof from behavior proof.

positiveExample.input: Build passed but runtime behavior unproven: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Separate build proof from behavior proof.

negativeExample.input: Build passed, so feature works.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Build passed but runtime behavior unproven

patterns.name: Unit test passed but integration path unproven
patterns.badClaim: Unit tests passed, so integration works.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Mark integration/e2e proof missing.

positiveExample.input: Unit test passed but integration path unproven: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Mark integration/e2e proof missing.

negativeExample.input: Unit tests passed, so integration works.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Unit test passed but integration path unproven

patterns.name: Lint/typecheck mistaken as test proof
patterns.badClaim: Typecheck passed, so behavior is tested.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Static proof is not behavior proof.

positiveExample.input: Lint/typecheck mistaken as test proof: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Static proof is not behavior proof.

negativeExample.input: Typecheck passed, so behavior is tested.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Lint/typecheck mistaken as test proof

patterns.name: Snapshot update mistaken as correctness
patterns.badClaim: Snapshots updated, so behavior is correct.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Flag snapshot mutation as review-sensitive.

positiveExample.input: Snapshot update mistaken as correctness: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Flag snapshot mutation as review-sensitive.

negativeExample.input: Snapshots updated, so behavior is correct.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Snapshot update mistaken as correctness

patterns.name: Golden fixture mutation mistaken as fix
patterns.badClaim: Goldens changed, so parser is fixed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Require rationale and before/after behavior evidence.

positiveExample.input: Golden fixture mutation mistaken as fix: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Require rationale and before/after behavior evidence.

negativeExample.input: Goldens changed, so parser is fixed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Golden fixture mutation mistaken as fix

patterns.name: Generated file change mistaken as source fix
patterns.badClaim: Generated artifact changed, so source issue is fixed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Ask for source cause and generation proof.

positiveExample.input: Generated file change mistaken as source fix: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Ask for source cause and generation proof.

negativeExample.input: Generated artifact changed, so source issue is fixed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Generated file change mistaken as source fix

patterns.name: Docs report mistaken as evidence
patterns.badClaim: The report says it passed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Docs are narrative, not proof.

positiveExample.input: Docs report mistaken as evidence: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Docs are narrative, not proof.

negativeExample.input: The report says it passed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Docs report mistaken as evidence

patterns.name: Screenshot absent for visual claim
patterns.badClaim: CSS changed, so UI is fixed.
patterns.expectedStaxBehavior: Require rendered screenshot or visual checklist.

positiveExample.input: Screenshot absent for visual claim: evidence is separated before action.
positiveExample.expected: Require rendered screenshot or visual checklist.

negativeExample.input: CSS changed, so UI is fixed.
negativeExample.expectedFailure: Screenshot absent for visual claim
